title: Smoky Jamaican Jerk Chicken and Black Olives
description: Grilled chicken with a spicy jerk seasoning and served with sautéed black olives. A perfect fusion of smoky and Caribbean flavors.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together jerk seasoning, brown sugar, allspice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breasts.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the black olives to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with the sautéed black olives.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
